theme_strategy.archetype: 1 (Organic & Earthy) mixed with GenZ Neo-Brutalist Layouts
theme_strategy.rationale: Patients and wellness users need warmth and trust (Cream/Gold), but GenZ demands high-energy, high-contrast layouts (Charcoal accents, huge typography, motion).

headings.style: Radical weight contrast (font-black for impact, tracking-tighter)

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-black text-[#2B3033]
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-bold text-[#2B3033]

marketing.alignment: Optical alignment, heavily asymmetric. Avoid centering blocks of text. Use left alignment for body copy.
marketing.hero_overlay: Max bg-black/30 or gradient overlay. Let the image breathe.

dashboard_cms.grid: Control Room Grid (cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4), gap-4
dashboard_cms.card_style: Cardless or flat cards with 1px border (#2B3033/15), NO drop-shadow, subtle rounded-md.

components_strategy.buttons: High contrast. Default: bg-[#2B3033] text-[#E0D8C8] hover:bg-[#1A1D1F]. Primary CTA: bg-[#C8A25F] text-white hover:bg-[#B38D4A]. Ensure explicit text color on hover.
components_strategy.navigation: Sticky Header with Crystal Glassmorphism: bg-[#E0D8C8]/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#2B3033]/10. Must have logo, 4 links, 1 primary CTA.
components_strategy.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee. 'Editorial Ribbon' style: Serif/Mono uppercase, pale background, dark text, massive gaps between items, extremely slow movement.
components_strategy.forms: Use Shadcn customized inputs. Border #2B3033/30, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#C8A25F] bg-transparent.
components_strategy.accessibility: ALL interactive elements must have 'data-testid' (e.g., 'submit-contact-button'). Minimal 4.5:1 contrast.

hero_image.description: Energetic GenZ youth drinking juice in the sun. Place in hero section.

product_bottles.description: Natural kombucha/health drink bottles. Use in Natural Flavors gallery.

about_team.description: Group of GenZ friends laughing in the sun. Use in About Us section.

instructions_to_main_agent: READ THIS CRITICAL RULE: Implement a fully responsive, pixel-perfect UI using Tailwind CSS based on the parameters above.
Add 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' via Google Fonts in public/index.html.
Configure tailwind.config.js with the custom colors provided: background, foreground, primary, border.
Create the Marketing pages (Home, Natural Flavors, Our Mission, About Us, Contact Us) using raw HTML/Tailwind for expressive layouts. AVOID Shadcn Card/Section for public pages to maintain asymmetry.
Create the Admin CMS Dashboard using Shadcn components (heavily customized with flat, 1px border style).
Integrate Framer Motion for scroll reveal animations and entrance staggers. Use 'lenis' for smooth scrolling on public pages.
Include 'data-testid' attributes on ALL interactive buttons, links, form inputs, and key UI markers for automated testing.
State management: Ensure that CMS updates (even if mocked via context/state) reflect on the public pages for 'fully Customizable from the backend' requirement.
